situation: Used gmail_tool.py draft command to reply to an email with CC recipients (Isabel, Shalom). The tool only replied to the sender (Alex), dropping the CC recipients entirely. Brian corrected this.
lesson: gmail_tool.py draft does NOT preserve CC recipients — it only replies to the From address. For reply-all, always pull full headers manually (To, Cc, Message-ID), then build a MIME message with explicit To/Cc fields and post via drafts().create(). This is non-negotiable — reply-all is Brian s default.
